chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2423 of 2019 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ For orders as to maintainability 26.02.2025 Mr. Masroor Ahmed, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh The petition assails orders dated 27.05.2011 and 13.11.2017, however, the petition was filed in the year 2019. Learned counsel for the petitioner remained unable to dispel the preponderance bar of laches, therefore, this petition found to be misconceived hence the same is dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
